product_updates.title: Ahead of its IPO, Anthropic’s Daniela Amodei shrugs off doubts about AI’s returns
product_updates.content: Anthropic has been growing at a breakneck pace. The company announced that annualized revenue crossed $47 billion in May, up dramatically from roughly $9 billion at the end of 2025. That trajectory faces a real test, though.

product_updates.title: Airbnb’s Brian Chesky plans to launch a new AI lab
product_updates.content: The Airbnb CEO said last year it hasn't struck an LLM partnership because existing products weren't quite ready.

product_updates.title: Defense tech, AI, and fundraising take center stage at StrictlyVC Los Angeles on June 18
product_updates.content: On Thursday, June 18, at The Aerospace Corporation Campus, investors, founders, and tech leaders will gather for an evening of conversation exploring some of the most consequential shifts taking place across venture capital, defense technology, artificial intelligence, and advanced industry. Secu…

product_updates.title: Meta steals a tactic from Tesla and builds data centers in tents
product_updates.content: Meta may have found one way to slash its massive data center bill: tents.

product_updates.title: Apple approves Poke as the first AI agent on its Messages for Business platform
product_updates.content: Poke, the startup that lets people use AI agents through simple text messages, has become the first AI agent approved for Apple’s Messages for Business platform.

product_updates.title: Meta rolls out a new AI creator assistant on Facebook
product_updates.content: Creators often have to parse through charts and dashboards to understand their performance, but with the new AI assistant, they can get quick answers to questions like "When should I post?" and "What are people saying in my comments?"

product_updates.title: What to expect from WWDC 2026: Siri’s highly anticipated revamp and Apple Intelligence updates
product_updates.content: Apple's WWDC nears: Here's what you can look forward to.

product_updates.title: Is Silicon Valley ready to put robots in people’s homes? Hello Robot is.
product_updates.content: The California startup released the fourth-generation of its home assistance robot, Stretch.

product_updates.title: Apple touts $1.4 trillion in App Store billings and sales, 90% without a commission
product_updates.content: Apple's App Store generated $1.4 trillion in sales, up from $1.3 trillion last year, with $149 billion in sales for digital goods.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Dashlane explains how attackers managed to download encrypted password vaults
technical_breakthroughs.content: By targeting large numbers of users, attackers increased their chances of success.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: AI-generated lawsuits and virtual power plants for data centers
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. technical_breakthroughs.title: How courts are coping with a flood of AI-generated lawsuits
technical_breakthroughs.content: Most days in her chambers, Judge Maritza Braswell, a federal magistrate judge in Colorado, sifts through stacks of documents written by people without a lawyer. Many of them can’t afford to hire a lawyer, and others have cases too weak or too small to interest one. She reads each one carefully, m…
